column1: # Called at end of every major init phase. LDA $000A / ORA #$80 / BNE $CB39 (always) / STA $000A / STA $2000.

column3: PPUBuffer_DrawCommand_RotateTilesRight1Pixel — reads CHR via buffered $2007 reads; rotates each byte right 1 pixel; uses PHA/LSR/PLA/ROR. Needs PPUDATA read-delay buffer.
